title: Order Malala's life events
subtitle: Place 7 events in chronological order (Track B · Intermediate)
instruction: From earliest to most recent. Click in order.

items.text: Malala is born in Mingora, Pakistan (1997)
She writes a blog for the BBC about life under Taliban (2009, age 11)
A Taliban gunman attacks Malala on her school bus (Oct 2012)
She moves to Birmingham, England for medical treatment (Oct 2012)
She publishes her book "I Am Malala" (2013)
She wins the Nobel Peace Prize at age 17 (Dec 2014)
She graduates from Oxford University with a PPE degree (2020)
